caption: bro they had me on dish pit for 6 hours today. six. my hands smell like industrial soap and regret
lmaoo at least you got paid. library was dead all day i got nothing done fr
deadass. mabel called during my break too had to take it outside in the heat like an idiot
how she doing tho
grandma's cornbread came out perfect in the cast iron tonight. recipe card up on the store now
red beans and rice that fed me 4 days for like 6 bucks. dorm budget cooking gang where you at
new lo-fi beat dropping on the channel tonight. made it between A&P flashcards lol
copped these Jordan 1 lows for resale. clean right? somebody's gonna want these
volunteered at the BP screening this weekend, checked 40 plus folks. health equity work is everything
studying anatomy at 2am again. these muscle origins gonna be the death of me
smothered chicken for the blog. shot it with just my phone and the kitchen window light
new printable nursing study planner up on etsy. drug cards, clinical checklists, all of it
28 dollar aldi haul that's feeding me all week. breakdown in my stories
pulled my anatomy grade from a C to a B this semester. GPA recovery is real yall
closing shift again. dish pit fingers wrinkled all the way up. nursing school better be worth this
marcus tried to season the chicken without me watching. we had words
gumbo for the blog this weekend. took me 3 hours and every pot i own
early morning run before my shift. one of my own beats in the headphones. peaceful for once
flashcards everywhere. pharmacology final tomorrow. wish me luck
first sourdough loaf in the tiny apartment kitchen. actually edible. small wins
